partial_progress.details: Phase 6 (strict density) partially implemented. Key insight: F(delta) in M in Case B1 via MCS negation completeness. Proved not CanonicalR(V, M). Blocked on not CanonicalR(M', V) - requires well-founded iteration approach.

review_reason: Phase 6 blocked: proving strictness of density intermediate requires well-founded iteration approach (Pattern B from research-041). Direct proof is complex due to GContent(M) subset GContent(M') relationship.

completion_data.completion_summary: Partial Phase 6 progress. Established F(delta) in M for Case B1 and proved one strictness direction. Full strict density proof requires well-founded iteration on candidate formula set.
